summary: ThreeDScene: spherical triangle on unit sphere with fixed A = north pole, B on prime meridian at arclength c=1.0; C parametrized on small circle of radius b=0.9 around A at angle A_tr (swept through π/2, 2π/3, π/4, 5π/6, π/3). always_redraw YELLOW/GREEN/RED great-circle arcs via slerp + vertex dots. Fixed panel shows LHS cos a vs RHS cos b cos c + sin b sin c cos A — match to 1e-4.
